dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4305 IS: Safer Prisons Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Blackburn (for herself and Mr. Cotton) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To increase the criminal penalties for assaulting a Bureau of Prisons correctional officer.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Safer Prisons Act of 2026.

section.header: Enhanced penalties for assault on Bureau of Prisons correctional officers
section.text: Section 111 of title 18, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subsection (c) as subsection (d); and
by inserting after subsection (b) the following:

subsection.header: Enhanced penalties for assault on Bureau of Prisons correctional officers
subsection.text: In the case of any violation of this section against a correctional officer of the Bureau of Prisons, the applicable maximum term of imprisonment under this section shall be doubled, and the applicable maximum fine shall be adjusted accordingly.
